news.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

news.title: Investor Enthusiasm Fuels China and Hong Kong Stock Surge
news.description: [DEVDISCOURSE] On Monday, stocks in China and Hong Kong saw a rise as investor excitement began expanding from artificial intelligence into other sectors, such as agriculture and biotechnology.

news.title: AI poses biggest security challenge of decade, UK’s Cooper warns
news.description: [THE STAR] The world must urgently develop guardrails to contain the threat posed by artificial intelligence, Britain's foreign secretary is set to warn.

news.description: [INDIA TV NEWS] Asian shares slipped on Monday as investors turned cautious ahead of crucial earnings seasons for the artificial intelligence sector.

news.title: Vietnam releases list of 'high-risk' AI systems
news.description: [THE STAR] HANOI: The Government has released a list of artificial intelligence (AI) systems classified as 'high-risk' that face the highest level of regulation under the Law on Artificial Intelligence.

news.title: The company powering Nvidia's AI chips wants a $28 billion Wall Street debut
news.description: [INDIA TODAY] SK Hynix is set to launch a $28 billion US listing after a sharp rally driven by AI chip demand. The offering underlines how companies supplying the hardware behind artificial intelligence are drawing huge investor interest.

news.title: Millennial Samsung union leader’s $26 billion bonus victory turns to bitterness
news.description: [THE JAPAN TIMES ] South Korea’s artificial intelligence gold rush has both emboldened a new generation of Korean tech workers and created new divisions among them.

news.title: A base for Singapore businesses expanding in Malaysia
news.description: [CNA] As advances in manufacturing, artificial intelligence and digital infrastructure reshape business needs, EcoWorld Industrial Platform offers companies one-stop support to establish and grow their operations in Malaysia.
